mapper.insert: insert into app_products(product_id, barcode, name, brand, image_url, price, currency, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, nutri_score, source, source_url, product_status, last_fetched_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{productId},#{barcode},#{name},#{brand},#{imageUrl},#{price},#{currency}, #{energyKcal},#{fat},#{saturatedFat},#{carbohydrates},#{sugars},#{fiber}, #{proteins},#{salt},#{nutriScore},#{source},#{sourceUrl},#{productStatus},#{lastFetchedAt}, #{createdAt},#{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select product_id, barcode, name, brand, image_url, price, currency, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, nutri_score, source, source_url, product_status, last_fetched_at, created_at, updated_at from app_products where barcode = #{barcode} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into app_products ( barcode, name, brand, image_url, currency, nutri_score, source, source_url, product_status, last_fetched_at ) values ( #{barcode}, #{name}, #{brand}, #{imageUrl}, #{currency}, #{nutriScore}, #{source}, #{sourceUrl}, #{productStatus}, #{lastFetchedAt} )
mapper.update: update app_products set energy_kcal = #{energyKcal}, fat = #{fat}, saturated_fat = #{saturatedFat}, carbohydrates = #{carbohydrates}, sugars = #{sugars}, fiber = #{fiber}, proteins = #{proteins}, salt = #{salt}, product_status = #{productStatus}, last_fetched_at = #{lastFetchedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where product_id = #{productId}
